title: Jae Black
compiled_truth: Jae Black is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-28 to 2002-02-28), Jae Black sent 154 and received 295 emails, totalling 449 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (99), [M  Presto](people/m-presto) (98), [J  Sturm](people/j-sturm) (94), [Mike Carson](people/mike-carson) (87), [Dana Davis](people/dana-davis) (85). Mailbox folders observed: calendar, deleted_items, enron_power, expenses, inbox, power.
